article.body_preview:
RANGPUR, June 25, 2023 (BSS) - A record number of locally-reared sacrificial animals has flooded local markets in Rangpur division as sale has already got momentum when only three days are left before the Eid-ul-Azha festivity.

Talking to BSS at different cattle markets, cattle farm owners and farmers said they reared local animals despite an increase of fodder price with a hope of getting better prices of sacrificial animals.

Cattle traders said sale of sacrificial animals might increase furt

llm_connections.evidence_quote: It proves that we do not need to import animals any more to meet local demand for ensuring fair price of locally reared cattle-heads
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly states that the surplus of sacrificial animals in Rangpur removes the need to import animals to meet local demand, which directly pertains to import volumes of animals.
